interactions.title: Initial Discovery Call — TechVentures
interactions.summary: First contact with Marcus Johnson (CTO) at TechVentures. Key pain points: Datadog cost ($50k/mo growing to $70k), alert fatigue, microservices correlation. High purchase intent. Decision expected Q1 2024.
interactions.outcome: Progressed to evaluation stage. Follow-up technical demo scheduled.

interactions.title: Pricing Proposal Delivery — TechVentures
interactions.summary: Sent formal pricing proposal: $28k/month for equivalent Datadog coverage. Marcus responded positively but flagged EU data residency and SOC 2 requirements as blockers to sign. Priya Patel (VP Eng) introduced as technical decision-maker.
interactions.outcome: Proposal under internal review. Compliance requirements to be addressed.

interactions.title: Internal AcmeCorp Account Strategy Review
interactions.summary: Internal discussion about TechVentures deal. Identified Marcus as financial champion, Priya as technical champion. Legal (Emily Russo) needs to review DPA before sign-off. Competitive risk: Datadog offering 20% discount to retain.
interactions.outcome: Agreed on EU data residency talking points and migration support package for Q1 meeting.

decisions.description: Agreed to proceed to formal evaluation with pricing proposal
EU data residency and SOC 2 report required before contract sign-off
AcmeCorp to include white-glove migration support in proposal (no extra charge)
TechVentures to evaluate phased migration approach starting with non-production environments

patterns.description: TechVentures consistently raises migration risk as primary objection after pricing is accepted
patterns.recommendation: Lead with migration support story early — before migration becomes the blocker

patterns.description: Marcus Johnson approves on ROI; Priya Patel must be technically satisfied before Marcus commits
patterns.recommendation: Always include Priya in technical discussions; do not proceed to contract without her sign-off

patterns.description: Datadog is likely to counter with retention discounts when deals reach evaluation stage
patterns.recommendation: Pre-empt with 3-year TCO comparison including Datadog's projected cost growth
